name: debug
description: Debugging and troubleshooting team. Use for diagnosing failures, environment issues, and test regressions.

agents.name: env-doctor
agents.description: Audits environment health — hooks, MCP servers, settings, dependencies

agents.name: test-writer-fixer
agents.description: Runs tests, analyzes failures, fixes broken tests while maintaining integrity

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Researches library docs and known issues via Context7

workflow.action: Audit environment and identify configuration issues
Research error messages and known issues
Run failing tests, analyze root cause, apply fixes
Verify all tests pass after fixes

triggers.automatic: Test failure in pipeline, environment setup issues
